titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 607

p.seg: William by the grace of God king of the Scots to his justices and sheriff of Berwick greeting.

I firmly forbid that the sergeands of my sheriffdom of Berwick should have any customs or make any demands in my alms at Coldingham and Coldinghamshire from the pleas and plaints which they move, which my sergeands of my other sheriffdoms have in my other alms in my land.
As witnesses, Ingram bishop of Glasgow, Nicholas chancellor, David Oliphant justice, Hugh Ridel, Robert Avenel.
